value.found_quote: ADK is the open-source agent development framework that lets you build, debug, and deploy reliable AI agents at enterprise scale. Available in Python, TypeScript, Go, Java, and Kotlin.
value.rationale: The fetched page is the official documentation site for Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK) at google.github.io/adk-docs/. It explicitly describes ADK as a generally available, open-source agent development framework from Google, with ADK Python 2.0 noted as "GA" (Generally Available). The page substantiates the claim fully and indicates the product is actively available.
